\DoxyCodeLine{\Hypertarget{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_source_l07540}07540\ \textcolor{comment}{\ \ \$:HeapSize\ The\ total\ size\ of\ memory\ used\ by\ the\ event\ system\ for\ management\ structures,\ and\ is\ allocated\ during\ startup.\ This\ does\ not\ include\ loaded\ file\ sizes.}}

\DoxyCodeLine{\Hypertarget{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_source_l07542}07542\ \textcolor{comment}{\ \ \$:LoadedSoundCount\ The\ number\ of\ sounds\ loaded\ and\ ready\ to\ play\ via\ cache\ event\ steps.}}
\DoxyCodeLine{\Hypertarget{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_source_l07543}07543\ \textcolor{comment}{\ \ \$:PlayingSoundCount\ The\ number\ of\ sounds\ currently\ playing\ via\ start\ sound\ event\ steps.}}

\DoxyCodeLine{\Hypertarget{_durango_2_miles_2include_2mss_8h_source_l07545}07545\ \textcolor{comment}{\ \ \$:PersistCount\ The\ number\ of\ presets\ persisted\ via\ the\ persist\ event\ step.}}
